task_completion.description: Log in to Moodle as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Admin User' or a similar admin profile indicator in the top right corner of the Moodle interface.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Manage tools page to register an external tool at the site level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage tools' page, typically accessed via Site administration -> Plugins -> Activity modules -> External tool.

task_completion.description: Register the new external LTI tool with the specified name, URL, consumer key, and shared secret.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tool configuration form with 'CodePractice Pro' in the Tool name field, 'https://codepractice.example.com/lti/launch' in the Tool URL field, and 'moodle-cs101-2024' in the Consumer key field (Shared secret may be masked with dots/asterisks). Alternatively, look for 'CodePractice Pro' successfully listed on the Manage tools page.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Introduction to Programming' (CS101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the course page titled 'Introduction to Programming' or 'CS101'.

task_completion.description: Initiate adding a new External tool activity in the course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the activity chooser with 'External tool' selected, or the 'Adding a new External tool' configuration page.

task_completion.description: Configure the External tool activity with the correct name and preconfigured tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the activity configuration form with 'Week 3: Python Loops Practice' in the Activity name field and 'CodePractice Pro' selected in the Preconfigured tool dropdown. Alternatively, look for the 'Week 3: Python Loops Practice' activity successfully added to the course page.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Moodle web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser showing the Moodle UI, rather than terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine Moodle pages and forms, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or direct database modifications to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open executing SQL commands or scripts to insert the LTI tool directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The external tool must be named 'CodePractice Pro' with URL 'https://codepractice.example.com/lti/launch', Consumer key 'moodle-cs101-2024', and Shared secret 'secretkey2024abc'. The course is 'Introduction to Programming' (CS101). The activity must be an External tool named 'Week 3: Python Loops Practice' using the 'CodePractice Pro' preconfigured tool.
